title: Scheduler Appointment Loader
description: Defines the synchronous loader function type for scheduler appointments.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: Function type for synchronously loading appointments based on a date range.

props.name: AXSchedulerAppointmentLoader
props.description: Synchronous function that takes a date range and returns an array of appointments for that period.

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: The date range for which to load appointments.

returns.description: Array of appointments for the specified date range.
